en: Number three is dreadful. Dreadful means very bad. We can talk about dreadful
ko: 세 번째는 dreadful이에요. Dreadful은 아주 나쁘다는 뜻이에요.

en: weather, dreadful mistakes or dreadful acting. An example, the news report was so
ko: 끔찍한 날씨, 끔찍한 실수, 끔찍한 연기처럼 쓸 수 있어요. 예를 들면, 그 뉴스 보도가 너무

en: dreadful that I just had to switch it off.
